message:
fix: address bugs found in code review

Bug fixes:
- conflict.service.ts: Fix hasContention() to detect multiple write
  accesses from different agents as contention (was only detecting
  write+read, not write+write)
- conflict.service.ts: Add check for single agent to avoid false
  positives (same agent can't contend with itself)
- checkpoint.ts: Fix verifyCheckpoint to use Array.isArray() check
  instead of truthy check for conversationHistory (empty arrays are
  truthy)
- auto-checkpoint.ts: Fix clearAutoCheckpointState() to collect IDs
  before iterating to avoid modifying Map while iterating

Tests:
- Add test for write+write contention detection
- Add test to verify same agent multiple accesses is not contention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
